ふふふ……。<br>やっぱり、ここが一番落ち着きますね……: Fufufu... As I thought, this is the most relaxing place, isn't it...
噴水の近くは、ひんやりしてて、湿気もあって……。 <br>わたしみたいな、デリケ:
Near the fountain, it's cool and humid... For a delicate body like mine,
it's the perfect spot...
紫外線を浴びると、お肌にもよくないですし、<br>こないだみたいに倒れちゃったら:
Exposure to UV rays is bad for your skin, and if I collapse like last
time, that would be awful, you know...
え？ わたし、肌が白くて綺麗……ですか！？<br>や、やだなぁ～……: Huh? You think my skin is white and beautiful...?! Oh, stop it...
ふふふっ、死体だから血色がないだけですよ～……<br>白いんじゃなくて、青白いだ:
Fufufu, it's just that I have no color because I'm a corpse... It's not
white, it's just pale, you see. Ehehehe!♪
